title: Blind Tagging
excerpt: Sometimes we need to tag users without notifying them; tracking the team assigned, or ensuring we have a running HR list documenting items for 1:1s or performance - would like to be able to assign a person in the People …

posts.author: kcarpenter (Kelly)
posts.cookedHtml: Sometimes we need to tag users without notifying them; tracking the team assigned, or ensuring we have a running HR list documenting items for 1:1s or performance - would like to be able to assign a person in the People column without a notification being sent.
